steps.title: Use the research clue
steps.content: The sentence says genetic research recently did something to show maize's ancestor is teosinte grass. The blank must fit the structure "its ancestor to be" and mean made known or showed.

steps.title: Choose the discovery verb
steps.content: Choice A does not naturally fit with "its ancestor to be." Choice C means requested formally, and choice D means made larger. The remaining word means made known, producing the clear phrase "revealed its ancestor to be teosinte grass." The answer is B.
